Home Tours Attractions Regions Food & Culture About Contact

The Timurid Grandeur of Herat — Additional Minaret-e-Jam

From $2,250 10 Days Group: Private or 2–8 travelers Apr–Oct Activity: Intermediate
Overview

About This Tour

A deep-country expedition starting in Kabul, flying to Herat and taking a 4x4 journey to the Minaret of Jam.

Regions: West, Central
Provinces: Kabul, Herat, Ghor
Travel Style: Cultural / Scenic
Day by Day

Tour Itinerary

  1. 1
    Day 1 Kabul

    Arrival & Orientation

    “Airport pickup, hotel check-in, and a relaxed orientation Sightseeing depending on arrival time.”

    Short city transfers.

  2. 2
    Day 2 Kabul

    Sightseeing Kabul

    “A day of sightseeing in Kabul.”

    Flight: FL-KBL-HER

    Short city transfers.

    Stops on this day

    Darulaman Palace

    Landmarks

    Kabul National Museum

    Landmarks

    Babur's Gardens

    Landmarks

  3. 3
    Day 3 Herat

    Fly Kabul - Herat and Sightseeing in Herat

    “Flight from Kabul to Herat with the remainder of the day of sightseeing in Kabul.”

    Short city transfers.

    Stops on this day

    Herat Friday Mosque

    Spiritual & Religious

    Herat Citadel

    Landmarks

    Herat Minarets

    Landmarks

  4. 4
    Day 4 Herat

    Early Drive to Ghor

    “Depart early morning for the towards the Minaret-e-Jam in Ghor Province. Depending on the conditions overnight in Ghor or return to Herat.”

    Short city transfers.

    Stops on this day

    Minaret of Jam

    Landmarks

  5. 5
    Day 5 Herat

    Sightseeing Herat

    “A day of sightseeing in Herat.”

    Short city transfers.

    Stops on this day

    Herat Friday Mosque

    Spiritual & Religious

    Herat Old City & Bazaars

    Bazaars & Artisans

  6. 6
    Day 6 Kabul

    Fly Back to Kabul and Sightseeing in Kabul

    “Flight from Herat back to Kabul with the remainder of the day of sightseeing in Kabul.”

    Flight: FL-HER-KBL

    Short city transfers.

    Stops on this day

    Kahfroshi Bird Market

    Bazaars & Artisans

    Kabul National Museum

    Landmarks

  7. 7
    Day 7 Kabul

    Sightseeing Kabul

    “A day of sightseeing in Kabul.”

    Short city transfers.

    Stops on this day

    Qargha Lake

    Nature & Adventure

    TV Tower Hill (Mount Asmai)

    Urban

  8. 8
    Day 8 Kabul

    Sightseeing Kabul

    “A day of sightseeing in Kabul.”

    Short city transfers.

    Stops on this day

    Shah-e-Du Shamshira Mosque

    Spiritual & Religious

    Kahfroshi Bird Market

    Bazaars & Artisans

  9. 9
    Day 9 Kabul

    Airport Transfer - Depart from Kabul

    “Hotel check-out and Airport Drop-off, departing flights from Kabul.”

    Short city transfers.

    Stops on this day

    TV Tower Hill (Mount Asmai)

    Urban

Highlights

Featured Attractions

Landmarks

Darulaman Palace

Iconic symbol of national resilience.

Kabul

Landmarks

Kabul National Museum

Treasury of Afghanistan's ancient past.

Kabul

Landmarks

Babur's Gardens

Terraced Mughal paradise in Kabul.

Kabul

A dazzling jewel of Timurid tilework.

Herat
